PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kurt Huysentruyt for Petitioner.

Mr. Huysentruyt stated that they have looked everywhere for the will, that they scoured his law office and that the Decedent wasn't a good housekeeper earlier in life. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
